title: Add deduplication for mining inventory double-counting
description:
## Evidence
`WorldStateProjector` has two inventory increment paths for the same mined block:
1. `ApplyBlockMined` — increments for self-dropping blocks  
2. `ApplyItemCollected` — increments when playerCollect fires

Code comments (WorldStateProjector.cs:106-117) explicitly acknowledge this double-counting tradeoff.

## Impact
Inventory can drift high. Crafting and gather goals appear complete earlier than they should. The overcount case is likely the common path.

## Fix
Options: (a) Make one source authoritative, (b) add deduplication keyed by correlationId + block position + item type, or (c) only increment in ApplyBlockMined for blocks where the drop might not be collectible, and rely on ItemCollectedEvent for everything else.

Add a regression test that mines a self-dropping block once and asserts inventory increases by exactly one.

## Verification
Verified against codebase 2026-06-23. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` section F10.
